svg.text: React Native · Expo · TypeScript · Zustand · TanStack Query · Same Backend API
NAVIGATION STRUCTURE — Expo Router / React Navigation
TanStack Query — server state (same as web, same API)
API CLIENT — Same OpenAPI-generated client as web · REST/HTTPS · Bearer JWT · Base: /api/v1
SHARED BACKEND — Node.js · Express · TypeScript (identical to web app)
